objectives: Understand core concepts of programming and web programming
Set up a basic workflow for creating and updating web pages
Create simple digital content for the web
learning_path.title: Foundations of Web Programming

objectives: Create well-structured pages using Html5
Organize content sections for clarity and reuse
Prepare markup that supports later styling and interactivity
learning_path.title: Building Structure with Html5

objectives: Apply Css3 to style Html5 content
Use layout and typography to improve readability
Create consistent visual design across pages
learning_path.title: Styling with Css3

objectives: Design layouts that adapt to different screen sizes
Implement responsive patterns using Css3
Validate responsive behavior across common viewport sizes
learning_path.title: Responsive Web Design Essentials

objectives: Apply Accessibility (Wcag/Aria) principles to web pages
Improve semantics and interaction patterns for inclusive use
Identify and fix common accessibility issues
learning_path.title: Accessibility (Wcag/Aria) in Practice

objectives: Use Browser Devtools to inspect Html5 and Css3
Debug layout and responsive issues efficiently
Validate accessibility-related changes during development
learning_path.title: Debugging and Inspection with Browser Devtools

objectives: Identify common performance bottlenecks in web pages
Use Browser Devtools to measure and diagnose performance issues
Apply practical optimizations to improve load and runtime behavior
learning_path.title: Web Performance Optimization Fundamentals

objectives: Build user interfaces using React
Structure a small React-based page and components
Connect React work to existing Html5/Css3 knowledge
learning_path.title: Introduction to React for Web Programming

objectives: Use TypeScript to improve code clarity and reliability
Apply TypeScript types to common programming patterns
Prepare TypeScript usage for UI development workflows
learning_path.title: TypeScript for Web Programming

objectives: Add TypeScript to an existing React codebase
Type React components and common UI patterns
Reduce runtime errors by strengthening type usage
learning_path.title: Add TypeScript to a React Project

objectives: Use tools for software configuration management to track changes and collaborate
Apply consistent versioning practices during development
Manage updates across Html5/Css3/React/TypeScript work
learning_path.title: Configuration Management Tools for Web Projects

objectives: Use e-services to support development and delivery activities
Integrate e-services into a simple web programming process
Maintain and update digital content using an e-service-enabled workflow
learning_path.title: Using E-Services in a Web Programming Workflow

matched_occupation.description: Web developers develop, implement and document web-accessible software based on the designs provided. They align the client's web presence with its business strategy, troubleshoot software problems and issues and look for ways to improve the application.
matched_occupation.label: web developer
